summary: Batch 5.5 Functional Repairs - All 4 critical bugs tested and verified. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified. Commission tiers correct (New 40%, Rated 35%, Elite 30%), session pricing correct (15min=RM15, 30min=RM30, 60min=RM60), profile endpoints return updated data, availability calendar has 24-hour grid with 30-min intervals.
critical_code_review_comments: Commission service has correct pricing: 15min=RM15, 30min=RM30, 60min=RM60 in SESSION_PRICES dict
Commission tiers correct: New 40%, Rated 35% (>=20 sessions + 4.5 rating), Elite 30% (>=100 sessions + 4.7 rating)
PUT /api/auth/update-profile now returns updated user document with gender field support
PUT /api/teacher/update-profile now returns updated teacher document
GET /api/teacher/dashboard-data returns tier info (level, name, commission_rate), wallet balance, and month stats
Teacher registration requires two API calls: POST /api/auth/register with role=teacher, then POST /api/auth/register-teacher
seed_data_creation: Created test teacher accounts for backend and frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 5.5 fixes verified. Key findings: (1) Revenue/pricing logic is in commission_service.py SESSION_PRICES dict (server-side only, not exposed via REST), (2) Commission tier evaluation works correctly via GET /api/commission/tiers, (3) Teacher dashboard returns complete tier/wallet/stats data, (4) Profile endpoints return updated documents for immediate UI state sync

bug_1_revenue_loop.commission_calculation: Platform takes commission, tutor gets remainder. New tutor: 40% platform, 60% tutor.

ui_features: Modal has Date, Start time, End time fields

bug_3_profile_amnesia.details: PUT /api/auth/update-profile returns updated user document in response
bug_3_profile_amnesia.ui_sync: ProfileManagement uses onUserUpdate prop to sync state immediately

elements_verified: Tier widget shows 'New Tutor' with '60% earnings rate'
Overview stats show Rating 5.0 and Total Classes 0
Add Availability modal with DATE, START, END fields
Payout modal with Bank Name, Account Number, Account Holder, Amount fields

mocked_apis.stripe_payments: MOCKED - Stripe payment processing is mocked
mocked_apis.bank_payouts: MOCKED - Teacher bank payouts saved to DB but no actual transfer
